# dynamodb-toolkit (v3)

> Zero-runtime-dependency, ESM-only micro-library for AWS DynamoDB built on the AWS JS SDK v3 (`@aws-sdk/client-dynamodb` + `@aws-sdk/lib-dynamodb`). Ships an `Adapter`, expression builders, batch + transaction chunking, mass operations, and a framework-agnostic REST core + `node:http` handler. Runtime targets Node 20+, latest Bun, latest Deno.

## Install

```sh
npm install dynamodb-toolkit @aws-sdk/client-dynamodb @aws-sdk/lib-dynamodb
```

## Quick start

```js
import {DynamoDBClient} from '@aws-sdk/client-dynamodb';
import {DynamoDBDocumentClient} from '@aws-sdk/lib-dynamodb';
import {Adapter} from 'dynamodb-toolkit';

const client = new DynamoDBClient({region: 'us-east-1'});
const docClient = DynamoDBDocumentClient.from(client, {
  marshallOptions: {removeUndefinedValues: true}
});

const adapter = new Adapter({
  client: docClient,
  table: 'planets',
  keyFields: ['name']
});

await adapter.put({name: 'Alderaan', diameter: 12500}, {force: true});
const item = await adapter.getByKey({name: 'Alderaan'});
await adapter.patch({name: 'Alderaan'}, {diameter: 13000}, {delete: ['climate']});
await adapter.delete({name: 'Alderaan'});
```

## Sub-exports

- `dynamodb-toolkit` ‚Äî `Adapter`, `Raw`, `raw()`, `stampCreatedAtISO`, `stampCreatedAtEpoch`, `TransactionLimitExceededError`, type re-exports
- `dynamodb-toolkit/expressions` ‚Äî `buildUpdate`, `addProjection`, `buildSearch`, `buildFilterByExample`, `buildCondition`, `buildKeyCondition`, `cleanParams`, `cloneParams`
- `dynamodb-toolkit/batch` ‚Äî `applyBatch`, `applyTransaction`, `explainTransactionCancellation`, `getBatch`, `getTransaction`, `backoff`, `TRANSACTION_LIMIT`
- `dynamodb-toolkit/mass` ‚Äî `paginateList`, `iterateList`, `iterateItems`, `readList`, `readByKeys`, `writeItems`, `deleteList`, `deleteByKeys`, `copyList`, `moveList`, `getTotal`, `encodeCursor`, `decodeCursor`, `mergeMapFn`, `runPaged`
- `dynamodb-toolkit/marshalling` ‚Äî `marshallDateISO`, `marshallDateEpoch`, `marshallMap`, `marshallURL` with `unmarshall*` pairs
- `dynamodb-toolkit/paths` ‚Äî `getPath`, `setPath`, `deletePath`, `applyPatch`, `normalizeFields`, `subsetObject`
- `dynamodb-toolkit/rest-core` ‚Äî `parseFields`, `parseSort`, `parseFilter` (structured clauses), `parseSearch` (free-form text), `parsePatch`, `parseNames`, `parsePaging`, `parseFlag`, `coerceStringQuery`, `buildEnvelope`, `buildErrorBody`, `paginationLinks`, `buildListOptions`, `resolveSort`, `stripMount`, `validateWriteBody`, `defaultPolicy`, `mapErrorStatus`, `mergePolicy`
- `dynamodb-toolkit/handler` ‚Äî `createHandler`, `matchRoute`, `readJsonBody`
- `dynamodb-toolkit/provisioning` ‚Äî `planTable`, `ensureTable`, `verifyTable`, `diffTable`, `readDescriptor`, `writeDescriptor`

## Adapter constructor options

| Field | Type | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `client` | `DynamoDBDocumentClient` | **Required.** Constructed via `DynamoDBDocumentClient.from(...)`. |
| `table` | `string` | **Required.** Base table name. |
| `keyFields` | `string[]` | **Required.** Partition key first, optional sort key second. |
| `projectionFieldMap` | `Record<string, string>` | Alias ‚Üí real field for projections. |
| `searchable` | `Record<string, 1 \| true>` | Fields that get a `searchablePrefix + field` lowercase mirror for substring filtering. |
| `searchablePrefix` | `string` | Default `'-search-'`. |
| `indirectIndices` | `Record<string, 1 \| true>` | `{IndexName: 1}` ‚Äî the index projects keys only; reads do a second batch get. |
| `hooks` | `AdapterHooks<TItem>` | Per-instance hook overrides; merges over defaults. |

### Hooks (defaults)

- `prepare(item, isPatch?)` ‚Äî identity. Pre-write transform; add technical fields, derived columns, search mirrors.
- `prepareKey(key, index?)` ‚Äî identity, then restricted to `keyFields`.
- `prepareListInput(example, index?)` ‚Äî `() => ({})`. Provides extra DynamoDB params for list/scan/query.
- `updateInput(input, op)` ‚Äî identity. Last-chance hook before SDK dispatch.
- `revive(rawItem, fields?)` ‚Äî `subsetObject(rawItem, fields)`. Post-read transform.
- `validateItem(item, isPatch?)` ‚Äî `async () => {}`. Throw to abort.
- `checkConsistency(batch)` ‚Äî `async () => null`. Returns extra `make*` items to bundle in the same `transactWriteItems`.

### Marker

- `Raw<T>` ‚Äî single bypass marker (the v2 `Raw` / `DbRaw` pair collapsed). Wrap with `raw(item)`. On writes skips `prepare` + `validateItem`. On reads with `{reviveItems: false}` results come back wrapped.

### CRUD

- `getByKey(key, fields?, options?)` ‚Üí `TItem | undefined`
- `getByKeys(keys, fields?, options?)` ‚Üí `TItem[]`
- `getList(options?, example?, index?)` ‚Üí `{data, offset, limit, total?}`
- `getListByParams(params, options?)` ‚Üí `{data, offset, limit, total?}`
- `post(item, {returnFailedItem?})` ‚Üí fails on existing key (ConditionalCheckFailedException ‚Üí 409)
- `put(item, {force?, conditions?, params?, returnFailedItem?})`
- `patch(key, patch, {delete?, separator?, arrayOps?, conditions?, params?, returnFailedItem?})`
- `delete(key, {conditions?, params?, returnFailedItem?})`
- `clone(key, mapFn?, {force?, params?})` ‚Üí cloned item or `undefined` (miss)
- `move(key, mapFn?, {force?, params?})` ‚Üí moved item or `undefined`

### Mass operations

- `putAll(items, {strategy?})` ‚Üí `{processed: number}` (`'native'` default uses BatchWrite; `'sequential'` does individual Puts)
- `deleteByKeys(keys, {strategy?})` ‚Üí `{processed}`
- `deleteAllByParams(params)` ‚Üí `{processed}`
- `cloneByKeys(keys, mapFn?)` / `cloneAllByParams(params, mapFn?)`
- `moveByKeys(keys, mapFn?)` / `moveAllByParams(params, mapFn?)`

### Batch builders (compose with `applyBatch` / `applyTransaction`)

- `makeGet(key, fields?, params?)` ‚Üí `{action: 'get', adapter, params}`
- `makeCheck(key, params?)` ‚Üí `{action: 'check', params}`
- `makePost(item, {returnFailedItem?}?)` ‚Üí `{action: 'put', params}` (with `attribute_not_exists` condition)
- `makePut(item, {force?, conditions?, params?, returnFailedItem?}?)` ‚Üí `{action: 'put', params}`
- `makePatch(key, patch, {delete?, separator?, arrayOps?, conditions?, params?, returnFailedItem?}?)` ‚Üí `{action: 'patch', params}`
- `makeDelete(key, {conditions?, params?, returnFailedItem?}?)` ‚Üí `{action: 'delete', params}`

`returnFailedItem: true` sets `ReturnValuesOnConditionCheckFailure: 'ALL_OLD'` ‚Äî the thrown `ConditionalCheckFailedException` carries the colliding item on `.Item`, and inside a transaction the matching `TransactionCanceledException.CancellationReasons[i].Item` is populated.

### Batch helpers

- `applyBatch(client, ...descriptors)` ‚Äî chunked `BatchWriteItem` (limit 25), `UnprocessedItems` retry.
- `applyTransaction(client, ...descriptors)` ‚Äî single `TransactWriteItems` call. Accepts `{options: {clientRequestToken?, returnConsumedCapacity?, returnItemCollectionMetrics?}}` sentinel at any position for transaction-level knobs.
- `explainTransactionCancellation(err, ...descriptors)` ‚Üí `{failures, message} | null`. Maps `TransactionCanceledException.CancellationReasons` back to input descriptors; returns `null` for non-cancellation errors.
- `getBatch` / `getTransaction` ‚Äî read counterparts.
- `backoff(from?, to?, finite?)` ‚Äî generator of exponential-jittered delays.

## REST handler

```js
import {createServer} from 'node:http';
import {createHandler} from 'dynamodb-toolkit/handler';

const handler = createHandler(adapter, {
  sortableIndices: {name: '-t-name-index'},
  policy: {/* override defaults */},
  maxBodyBytes: 1024 * 1024 // default 1 MB; bodies exceeding ‚Üí 413 PayloadTooLarge
});
createServer(handler).listen(3000);
```

### DoS-mitigation caps

- `createHandler`: `maxBodyBytes` (default 1 MB) ‚Äî oversized bodies ‚Üí HTTP 413.
- `defaultPolicy.maxOffset`: 100_000 ‚Äî caller-supplied `?offset=` clamped before `paginateList`.
- Parsers: `parseFields(input, {maxItems})` / `parseNames(input, {maxItems})` default 1000; `parseSearch(input, {maxLength})` default 1024; `parsePaging(input, {maxOffset, maxLimit, defaultLimit})` defaults 100_000 / 100 / 10.

### Standard route pack

| Method | URL | Maps to |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/` | `getList` + paginated envelope `{data, offset, limit, total, links?}` |
| `GET` | `/:key` | `getByKey` (404 on miss) |
| `GET` | `/-by-names?names=A,B` | `getByKeys` (plain array, missing dropped) |
| `POST` | `/` | `post` (204; 409 on existing) |
| `PUT` | `/:key?force=true` | `put` (204; 409 without force on missing) |
| `PATCH` | `/:key` | `patch` (body: `{field, _delete, _separator, _arrayOps}`) |
| `DELETE` | `/:key` | `delete` (204, idempotent) |
| `DELETE` | `/?filter=‚Ä¶` | `deleteAllByParams` (`{processed}`) |
| `DELETE` | `/-by-names?names=‚Ä¶` | `deleteByKeys` (`{processed}`) |
| `PUT` | `/-load` | `putAll` (body: array of items; `{processed}`) |
| `PUT` | `/-clone` / `/-move` | `cloneAllByParams` / `moveAllByParams` (body: overlay) |
| `PUT` | `/-clone-by-names?names=‚Ä¶` / `/-move-by-names?names=‚Ä¶` | `cloneByKeys` / `moveByKeys` |
| `PUT` | `/:key/-clone` / `/:key/-move` | single-item `clone` / `move` |

### Query parameters

- `?fields=name,climate` ‚Äî projection
- `?filter=tooine` ‚Äî `searchable` substring filter (lowercased)
- `?sort=name` / `?sort=-name` ‚Äî ascending / descending; resolved to a GSI via `sortableIndices`
- `?offset=N&limit=N` ‚Äî pagination
- `?consistent=yes|true|1|on` ‚Äî strong consistency
- `?force=yes|true|1|on` ‚Äî overwrite without existence check on `put`/`clone`/`move`

### Error mapping

`ConditionalCheckFailedException` ‚Üí 409, `ValidationException` ‚Üí 422, throughput / limits ‚Üí 429, 5xx SDK ‚Üí 503, anything else ‚Üí 500. Override via `policy.statusCodes` and `policy.errorBody`.

## Framework adapters

The bundled `dynamodb-toolkit/handler` is `node:http`-only. Framework-specific bindings ship as separate packages (zero runtime deps in the core; frameworks are peer deps of each adapter). All four adapters share the same wire contract (routes, query parameters, envelope, error mapping) as the bundled handler.

- `dynamodb-toolkit-koa` ‚Äî Koa 2.x middleware. https://www.npmjs.com/package/dynamodb-toolkit-koa
- `dynamodb-toolkit-express` ‚Äî Express 4.x / 5.x middleware / Router. https://www.npmjs.com/package/dynamodb-toolkit-express
- `dynamodb-toolkit-fetch` ‚Äî `(Request) => Promise<Response>` for Cloudflare Workers, Deno Deploy, Bun.serve, Hono, and Node's native fetch server. https://www.npmjs.com/package/dynamodb-toolkit-fetch
- `dynamodb-toolkit-lambda` ‚Äî AWS Lambda handler for API Gateway REST + HTTP, Function URL, and ALB. Ships local-debug bridges (`createNodeListener` / `createFetchBridge`) for running the handler on real HTTP without `sam local`. https://www.npmjs.com/package/dynamodb-toolkit-lambda

## Patching

```js
await adapter.patch({name: 'Alderaan'}, {diameter: 13000}, {delete: ['climate', 'meta.tag']});
```

`options.delete` lists paths to `REMOVE`. `options.separator` (default `'.'`) splits keys for nested paths; pure-digit segments become array indices. Key fields are stripped from the patch automatically. Atomic array ops via `options.arrayOps: [{op, path, ...}]` ‚Äî `op` ‚àà `'append' | 'prepend' | 'setAtIndex' | 'removeAtIndex' | 'add'`.

On the wire, the same shape uses `_delete` / `_separator` / `_arrayOps` keys (configurable via `policy.metaPrefix`).

## Migration: v2 ‚Üí v3

- AWS SDK v3 peer-deps replace `aws-sdk` v2.
- One data format (plain JS via `lib-dynamodb`); `Raw` / `DbRaw` collapsed to `Raw<T>`.
- Options bags: `put(item, {force: true})` instead of `put(item, true)`; `patch(key, patch, {delete: [...]})`.
- Hooks renamed: `prepareListParams` ‚Üí `prepareListInput`, `updateParams` ‚Üí `updateInput`.
- Patch wire format: `_delete` / `_separator` (single underscore).
- REST split into `rest-core` (framework-agnostic) + `handler` (`node:http`). Koa lives in a separate package.
- Dropped: `makeClient`, `getProfileName`, `specialTypes`, `converter`, `converterOptions` ‚Äî use `@aws-sdk/credential-providers`.

## Links

- Wiki: https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit/wiki
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/dynamodb-toolkit
- Full LLM reference: https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit/blob/master/llms-full.txt
